nasb.text: And lovingkindness is Yours, O Lord, For You recompense a man according to his work.

esv.text: and that to you, O Lord, belongs steadfast love. For you will render to a man according to his work.

cnv.text: 主啊！慈愛也屬於你， 你必照各人所作的報應各人。

ccb.text: 充满慈爱。 主啊，你必照各人的行为来施行赏罚。

csbs.text: 主啊，慈爱也在于你， 因为你照着各人所做的回报他。
